body: Capture links packets to code-graph nodes at write time; recall token budget stays opt-in/bounded. Personal Memory section trims first when over budget (ranks last); kage resume has its own ~800-token timeline cap; receipts use max(read-vs-source, replay discovery_tokens). Unchanged by 2.2.1.
